<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ja">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
<title>すし大臣 50周年記念ルーレット</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Shippori+Mincho:wght@600;700;800&family=Noto+Sans+JP:wght@400;500;700;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --bg-0:#0a0a0c;
    --bg-1:#141118;
    --bg-2:#1d1822;
    --gold-1:#fff4cf;
    --gold-2:#f5d97a;
    --gold-3:#d4af37;
    --gold-4:#9d7b1f;
    --gold-deep:#6b5414;
    --line:rgba(212,175,55,.35);
    --ink:#0a0a0c;
    --paper:#f7f1e3;
    --red:#b3262b;
  }

  *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
  html,body{height:100%;}
  body{
    font-family:"Noto Sans JP",sans-serif;
    background:
      radial-gradient(120% 80% at 50% -10%, #20121f 0%, transparent 55%),
      radial-gradient(100% 70% at 50% 110%, #1a1508 0%, transparent 50%),
      linear-gradient(180deg,#0a0a0c 0%, #141118 50%, #0a0a0c 100%);
    color:var(--gold-1);
    min-height:100vh;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;
    overflow-x:hidden;
    position:relative;
  }
  /* 和柄テクスチャ（青海波風）の薄いオーバーレイ */
  body::before{
    content:"";
    position:fixed;inset:0;
    background-image:
      radial-gradient(circle at 50% 100%, transparent 14px, rgba(212,175,55,.045) 15px, transparent 16px),
      radial-gradient(circle at 0% 100%, transparent 14px, rgba(212,175,55,.045) 15px, transparent 16px),
      radial-gradient(circle at 100% 100%, transparent 14px, rgba(212,175,55,.045) 15px, transparent 16px);
    background-size:48px 24px;
    background-position:0 0;
    pointer-events:none;
    z-index:0;
    opacity:.6;
  }
  .wrap{
    width:100%;
    max-width:480px;
    padding:0 16px 40px;
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;
  }

  /* ===== バナー ===== */
  .banner{
    width:100%;
    margin-top:14px;
    border-radius:14px;
    overflow:hidden;
    box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.6), 0 0 0 1px rgba(212,175,55,.25), inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,244,207,.08);
  }
  .banner img{display:block;width:100%;height:auto;}

  /* ===== 共通：金箔テキスト ===== */
  .gold-text{
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--gold-1) 0%, var(--gold-2) 38%, var(--gold-3) 60%, var(--gold-4) 100%);
    -webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;color:transparent;
    filter:drop-shadow(0 1px 1px rgba(0,0,0,.5));
  }

  /* ===== セクション切り替え ===== */
  .screen{width:100%;display:none;animation:fade .5s ease both;}
  .screen.active{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}
  @keyframes fade{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}

  /* ===== ルーレット画面 ===== */
  .lead{
    text-align:center;
    margin:22px 0 6px;
    font-family:"Shippori Mincho",serif;
    font-weight:800;
    font-size:19px;
    letter-spacing:.08em;
  }
  .lead small{display:block;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.18em;color:var(--gold-3);margin-top:6px;font-family:"Noto Sans JP";font-weight:500;}

  .machine{
    width:100%;
    margin-top:18px;
    padding:18px 16px 22px;
    border-radius:18px;
    background:
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(40,30,12,.7), rgba(15,12,8,.9));
    box-shadow:
      0 0 0 2px var(--gold-4),
      0 0 0 4px var(--bg-0),
      0 0 0 5px rgba(212,175,55,.4),
      0 18px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.6),
      inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,244,207,.15);
    position:relative;
  }
  .machine::after{
    content:"";position:absolute;inset:6px;border-radius:14px;
    border:1px solid rgba(212,175,55,.18);pointer-events:none;
  }
  .reels{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);
    gap:10px;
    position:relative;
  }
  .reel{
    position:relative;
    height:108px;
    border-radius:12px;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbf6ea,#e9dcc0);
    overflow:hidden;
    box-shadow:
      inset 0 8px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.35),
      inset 0 -8px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.25),
      0 2px 0 rgba(255,244,207,.3);
    border:2px solid var(--gold-4);
  }
  /* リール上下のグラデで“窓”感 */
  .reel::before,.reel::after{
    content:"";position:absolute;left:0;right:0;height:30px;z-index:3;pointer-events:none;
  }
  .reel::before{top:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(20,15,8,.55),transparent);}
  .reel::after{bottom:0;background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(20,15,8,.55),transparent);}
  .reel-strip{
    position:absolute;left:0;right:0;top:0;
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;
    will-change:transform;
  }
  .sym{
    height:108px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:58px;
    line-height:1;
    user-select:none;
  }
  .sym-img{
    width:84px;height:84px;object-fit:contain;
    -webkit-user-drag:none;user-select:none;pointer-events:none;
    filter:drop-shadow(0 2px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.25));
  }
  /* 中央ライン */
  .payline{
    position:absolute;top:50%;left:8px;right:8px;height:2px;
    background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--red),transparent);
    transform:translateY(-1px);
    z-index:4;opacity:.0;transition:opacity .3s;
  }
  .machine.win .payline{opacity:.9;}

  .spin-btn{
    margin-top:20px;
    width:100%;
    padding:16px;
    border:none;
    border-radius:50px;
    font-family:"Shippori Mincho",serif;
    font-weight:800;
    font-size:20px;
    letter-spacing:.14em;
    color:#2a1d05;
    cursor:pointer;
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--gold-1),var(--gold-2) 45%,var(--gold-3) 75%,var(--gold-4));
    box-shadow:0 6px 0 var(--gold-deep), 0 12px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.5), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.6);
    transition:transform .08s, box-shadow .08s, opacity .25s;
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
  }
  .spin-btn:active:not(:disabled){transform:translateY(4px);box-shadow:0 2px 0 var(--gold-deep),0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.5),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.6);}
  .spin-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:default;}

  .hint{
    margin-top:16px;text-align:center;font-size:11.5px;line-height:1.9;
    color:rgba(245,217,122,.7);letter-spacing:.04em;
  }
  .prizes{
    width:100%;margin-top:18px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);padding-top:14px;
  }
  .prizes h3{
    text-align:center;font-family:"Shippori Mincho",serif;font-size:13px;
    letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--gold-3);margin-bottom:10px;font-weight:700;
  }
  .prow{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:7px 4px;font-size:13px;
    border-bottom:1px dashed rgba(212,175,55,.15);
  }
  .prow:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
  .prow .rk{font-family:"Shippori Mincho",serif;font-weight:800;font-size:14px;width:34px;flex-shrink:0;}
  .prow .em{font-size:20px;width:28px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;}
  .prow .nm{flex:1;color:var(--gold-1);}
  .prow .of{font-weight:700;color:var(--gold-2);}

  /* ===== 抽選中オーバーレイ文字 ===== */
  .status{
    height:22px;margin-top:14px;text-align:center;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.2em;
    color:var(--gold-2);font-family:"Shippori Mincho",serif;font-weight:700;
  }

  /* ===== クーポン画面 ===== */
  #couponScreen{justify-content:center;min-height:80vh;}
  .reveal-flash{position:fixed;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle,#fff4cf,transparent 60%);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:50;}
  .coupon{
    width:100%;
    margin-top:24px;
    border-radius:18px;
    padding:30px 22px 26px;
    text-align:center;
    position:relative;
    background:
      linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(35,26,10,.96), rgba(12,10,7,.98));
    box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--gold-3),0 0 0 4px var(--bg-0),0 0 40px rgba(212,175,55,.3),0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.7);
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .coupon::before{
    content:"";position:absolute;inset:8px;border:1px dashed rgba(212,175,55,.4);border-radius:12px;pointer-events:none;
  }
  /* チケットの切り込み */
  .coupon .notch{position:absolute;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--bg-0);top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);}
  .coupon .notch.l{left:-13px;} .coupon .notch.r{right:-13px;}

  .c-badge{
    display:inline-block;font-family:"Shippori Mincho",serif;font-weight:800;
    font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.3em;padding:5px 18px;border-radius:40px;
    border:1px solid var(--gold-3);color:var(--gold-2);margin-bottom:8px;
  }
  .c-emoji{font-size:74px;line-height:1;margin:6px 0 2px;animation:pop .6s cubic-bezier(.2,1.4,.4,1) both;}
  .c-emoji-img{
    width:96px;height:96px;object-fit:contain;
    -webkit-user-drag:none;pointer-events:none;
    filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.4));
    animation:pop .6s cubic-bezier(.2,1.4,.4,1) both;
  }
  .em-img{width:26px;height:26px;object-fit:contain;vertical-align:middle;-webkit-user-drag:none;pointer-events:none;}
  @keyframes pop{from{transform:scale(0) rotate(-20deg);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1) rotate(0);opacity:1;}}
  .c-rank{font-family:"Shippori Mincho",serif;font-weight:800;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:.05em;margin-top:4px;}
  .c-name{font-size:15px;color:var(--gold-1);margin-top:2px;letter-spacing:.06em;}
  .c-off{
    font-family:"Shippori Mincho",serif;font-weight:800;
    font-size:54px;line-height:1.05;margin:10px 0 2px;letter-spacing:.02em;
  }
  .c-off .pct{font-size:30px;}
  .c-sub{font-size:13px;color:var(--gold-3);letter-spacing:.08em;}
  .c-note{margin-top:14px;font-size:10.5px;line-height:1.8;color:rgba(245,217,122,.6);letter-spacing:.03em;}
  .c-divider{height:1px;background:var(--line);margin:16px 0;}

  .use-btn{
    margin-top:18px;width:100%;padding:15px;border:none;border-radius:12px;cursor:pointer;
    font-family:"Noto Sans JP";font-weight:900;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:.12em;
    color:var(--paper);
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,#c8302f,#8e1c20);
    box-shadow:0 5px 0 #5c1013,0 10px 18px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
    transition:transform .08s,box-shadow .08s;
  }
  .use-btn:active{transform:translateY(3px);box-shadow:0 2px 0 #5c1013,0 5px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5);}
  .c-instruct{margin-top:14px;font-size:11px;color:rgba(245,217,122,.55);letter-spacing:.05em;text-align:center;}

  /* 参加賞テーマ */
  .coupon.consolation{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(180,180,200,.5),0 0 0 4px var(--bg-0),0 0 30px rgba(160,170,200,.2),0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.7);}
  .coupon.consolation .c-badge{border-color:rgba(200,205,220,.6);color:#cfd4e0;}
  .coupon.consolation .c-rank,.coupon.consolation .c-off,.coupon.consolation .c-name{
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#c2c8d6 60%,#8b91a3);
    -webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  }
  .coupon.consolation .c-sub{color:#aab0c0;}

  /* 紙吹雪 */
  .confetti{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:40;overflow:hidden;}
  .confetti i{position:absolute;top:-20px;width:9px;height:14px;opacity:.95;animation:fall linear forwards;}
  @keyframes fall{to{transform:translateY(110vh) rotate(540deg);opacity:.2;}}

  /* 完了トースト */
  .toast{
    position:fixed;left:50%;bottom:34px;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(40px);
    background:rgba(20,17,24,.96);color:var(--gold-1);border:1px solid var(--line);
    padding:12px 22px;border-radius:40px;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.08em;z-index:60;
    opacity:0;transition:.4s;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
  }
  .toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}

  .footer{margin-top:26px;font-size:10px;color:rgba(212,175,55,.4);letter-spacing:.1em;text-align:center;}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="confetti" id="confetti"></div>
<div class="reveal-flash" id="flash"></div>

<div class="wrap">

  <div class="banner">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="すし大臣 50周年記念ルーレット企画 お会計最大20%引き">
  </div>

  <!-- ===== ① ルーレット画面 ===== -->
  <section class="screen active" id="rouletteScreen">
    <div class="lead gold-text">
      お会計時のお楽しみ抽選
      <small>3つの絵柄が揃えば当選！</small>
    </div>

    <div class="machine" id="machine">
      <div class="reels">
        <div class="reel"><div class="reel-strip" id="strip0"></div></div>
        <div class="reel"><div class="reel-strip" id="strip1"></div></div>
        <div class="reel"><div class="reel-strip" id="strip2"></div></div>
        <div class="payline"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="status" id="status"></div>

    <button class="spin-btn" id="spinBtn" onclick="startSpin()">抽選スタート</button>

    <div class="prizes">
      <h3>― 賞 品 ―</h3>
      <div class="prow"><span class="rk gold-text">1等</span><span class="em">🍣</span><span class="nm">マグロ鮨</span><span class="of">20%引き</span></div>
      <div class="prow"><span class="rk gold-text">2等</span><span class="em"><img class="em-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""></span><span class="nm">穴子寿司</span><span class="of">10%引き</span></div>
      <div class="prow"><span class="rk gold-text">3等</span><span class="em"><img class="em-img" src="data:image/png;base64," alt=""></span><span class="nm">玉子寿司</span><span class="of">5%引き</span></div>
      <div class="prow"><span class="rk" style="color:#aab0c0;">参加賞</span><span class="em">🥤</span><span class="nm">次回ワンドリンク無料</span><span class="of" style="color:#cfd4e0;">FREE</span></div>
    </div>

    <div class="hint">スタッフ立会いのもと抽選してください<br>当選結果はこの場でスタッフへご提示ください</div>
  </section>

  <!-- ===== ② クーポン画面 ===== -->
  <section class="screen" id="couponScreen">
    <div class="coupon" id="coupon">
      <span class="notch l"></span><span class="notch r"></span>
      <div class="c-badge" id="cBadge">当 選</div>
      <div class="c-emoji" id="cEmoji">🍣</div>
      <div class="c-rank" id="cRank">1等</div>
      <div class="c-name" id="cName">マグロ鮨</div>
      <div class="c-off" id="cOff">20<span class="pct">%引き</span></div>
      <div class="c-sub" id="cSub">本日のお会計に適用</div>
      <div class="c-divider"></div>
      <div class="c-note" id="cNote">
        ※本クーポンはお会計1回のみ有効です。<br>
        ※他クーポン・割引との併用はできません。<br>
        ※スタッフが「利用済み」を押して適用します。
      </div>
      <button class="use-btn" onclick="useCoupon()">利用済みにする</button>
    </div>
    <div class="c-instruct">スタッフが内容を確認後、ボタンを押してください</div>
  </section>

  <div class="footer">すし大臣 50th Anniversary</div>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="toast">クーポンを適用しました。ありがとうございました！</div>

<script>
/* ========== 賞品設定 ==========
   確率：1等1% / 2等3% / 3等5% / 参加賞91%
   3つの絵柄が揃ったら当選という演出にするため、
   先に抽選結果を確定し、その結果に合わせてリールを止める方式。 */
/* 絵柄の定義。type:"img" は画像(Base64)、"emoji" は絵文字。
   玉子・穴子はアップロードされたイラストを使用。 */
const IMG_TAMAGO = "data:image/png;base64,";
const IMG_ANAGO  = "data:image/png;base64,";

const SYM = {
  maguro: {type:"emoji", val:"🍣"},
  anago:  {type:"img",   val:IMG_ANAGO},
  tamago: {type:"img",   val:IMG_TAMAGO},
  drink:  {type:"emoji", val:"🥤"},
  ebi:    {type:"emoji", val:"🦐"},
  fish:   {type:"emoji", val:"🐟"},
  sake:   {type:"emoji", val:"🍶"},
  hashi:  {type:"emoji", val:"🥢"}
};
// 絵柄1つをHTML文字列にする
function symHTML(key){
  const s = SYM[key];
  if(s.type==="img"){
    return `<div class="sym"><img class="sym-img" src="${s.val}" alt=""></div>`;
  }
  return `<div class="sym">${s.val}</div>`;
}
function symHTMLFinal(key){
  const s = SYM[key];
  if(s.type==="img"){
    return `<div class="sym" data-final="1"><img class="sym-img" src="${s.val}" alt=""></div>`;
  }
  return `<div class="sym" data-final="1">${s.val}</div>`;
}

const PRIZES = {
  p1: {rank:"1等",  name:"マグロ鮨", sym:"maguro", off:"20", sub:"本日のお会計に適用", badge:"当 選", win:true},
  p2: {rank:"2等",  name:"穴子寿司", sym:"anago",  off:"10", sub:"本日のお会計に適用", badge:"当 選", win:true},
  p3: {rank:"3等",  name:"玉子寿司", sym:"tamago", off:"5",  sub:"本日のお会計に適用", badge:"当 選", win:true},
  cs: {rank:"参加賞", name:"次回ワンドリンク無料", sym:"drink", off:"FREE", sub:"次回ご来店時に利用可能", badge:"参 加 賞", win:false}
};
// リール上に流す絵柄キーのセット
const SYMBOLS = ["maguro","anago","tamago","drink","ebi","fish","sake","hashi"];

let spinning = false;
let currentResult = null;

/* ----- 抽選（確率に基づき結果決定） ----- */
function drawResult(){
  const r = Math.random()*100;
  if(r < 5) return "p1";           // 5%
  if(r < 5+10) return "p2";        // 10%
  if(r < 5+10+20) return "p3";     // 20%
  return "cs";                     // 残り65%
}

/* ----- リールの絵柄列を組み立てる ----- */
function buildStrips(finalSymbols){
  // finalSymbols: 各リールが最終的に中央に止める絵柄キー [k0,k1,k2]
  for(let i=0;i<3;i++){
    const strip = document.getElementById("strip"+i);
    strip.style.transition="none";
    strip.style.transform="translateY(0)";
    let html="";
    // たくさんの絵柄を並べて回転感を出す。最後に確定絵柄を置く。
    const loops = 14 + i*4;
    for(let n=0;n<loops;n++){
      html += symHTML(SYMBOLS[Math.floor(Math.random()*SYMBOLS.length)]);
    }
    // 確定絵柄（中央に来る位置）
    html += symHTMLFinal(finalSymbols[i]);
    // 下に1つ余白絵柄
    html += symHTML(SYMBOLS[Math.floor(Math.random()*SYMBOLS.length)]);
    strip.innerHTML = html;
  }
}

/* ----- スピン開始 ----- */
function startSpin(){
  if(spinning) return;
  spinning = true;
  const btn = document.getElementById("spinBtn");
  btn.disabled = true;
  document.getElementById("machine").classList.remove("win");
  document.getElementById("status").textContent = "抽選中…";

  // 結果確定
  currentResult = drawResult();
  const prize = PRIZES[currentResult];

  // 各リールが止める絵柄を決める
  let finals;
  if(prize.win){
    // 当選：3つとも当選絵柄で揃える
    finals = [prize.sym, prize.sym, prize.sym];
  }else{
    // ハズレ：揃わないように調整（少なくとも1つ違う絵柄）
    finals = pickNonMatching();
  }

  buildStrips(finals);

  // リールの高さ
  const SYM_H = 108;
  // 各リールを順番に停止させる
  const stopDelays = [900, 1700, 2500]; // ms：1つずつ止まる

  for(let i=0;i<3;i++){
    const strip = document.getElementById("strip"+i);
    const finalEl = strip.querySelector('[data-final="1"]');
    const finalIndex = Array.from(strip.children).indexOf(finalEl);
    // 中央に来る位置 = finalIndex番目を窓の中央(中段)へ
    // リール窓は1絵柄分(108px)。中央に置くにはそのままfinalIndex*SYM_H分上にずらす
    const targetY = -(finalIndex * SYM_H);

    // 強制リフロー
    void strip.offsetHeight;

    setTimeout(()=>{
      strip.style.transition = `transform ${ (stopDelays[i]/1000).toFixed(2) }s cubic-bezier(.16,.8,.18,1)`;
      strip.style.transform = `translateY(${targetY}px)`;
    }, 40);

    // 各リール停止時のSE的フィードバック（class付与）
    setTimeout(()=>{
      strip.parentElement.style.boxShadow =
        "inset 0 8px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.35),inset 0 -8px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.25),0 0 12px rgba(212,175,55,.6),0 2px 0 rgba(255,244,207,.3)";
      setTimeout(()=>{strip.parentElement.style.boxShadow="";},250);
      // 最後のリール停止後の処理
      if(i===2){
        finishSpin(prize);
      }
    }, 40 + stopDelays[i]);
  }
}

/* ----- 揃わない絵柄の組み合わせを作る ----- */
function pickNonMatching(){
  const pool = SYMBOLS.slice();
  let a,b,c;
  do{
    a = pool[Math.floor(Math.random()*pool.length)];
    b = pool[Math.floor(Math.random()*pool.length)];
    c = pool[Math.floor(Math.random()*pool.length)];
  }while(a===b && b===c); // 3つ揃いを除外
  return [a,b,c];
}

/* ----- スピン完了 → 1秒後にクーポン表示 ----- */
function finishSpin(prize){
  const status = document.getElementById("status");
  if(prize.win){
    document.getElementById("machine").classList.add("win");
    status.textContent = "おめでとうございます！";
  }else{
    status.textContent = "ご参加ありがとうございます";
  }

  // 1秒後にクーポン表示
  setTimeout(()=>{
    showCoupon(prize);
    spinning = false;
  }, 1000);
}

/* ----- クーポン表示 ----- */
function showCoupon(prize){
  const coupon = document.getElementById("coupon");
  document.getElementById("cBadge").textContent = prize.badge;
  // 絵柄（画像 or 絵文字）を表示
  const sym = SYM[prize.sym];
  const cEmoji = document.getElementById("cEmoji");
  if(sym.type==="img"){
    cEmoji.innerHTML = `<img class="c-emoji-img" src="${sym.val}" alt="">`;
  }else{
    cEmoji.textContent = sym.val;
  }
  document.getElementById("cRank").textContent = prize.rank;
  document.getElementById("cName").textContent = prize.name;
  document.getElementById("cSub").textContent = prize.sub;

  const offEl = document.getElementById("cOff");
  if(prize.off === "FREE"){
    offEl.innerHTML = `1ドリンク<span class="pct"> 無料</span>`;
    document.getElementById("cNote").innerHTML =
      "※本クーポンは次回ご来店時に1杯分有効です。<br>※他クーポン・割引との併用はできません。<br>※スタッフが「利用済み」を押して適用します。";
    coupon.classList.add("consolation");
  }else{
    offEl.innerHTML = `${prize.off}<span class="pct">%引き</span>`;
    document.getElementById("cNote").innerHTML =
      "※本クーポンはお会計1回のみ有効です。<br>※他クーポン・割引との併用はできません。<br>※スタッフが「利用済み」を押して適用します。";
    coupon.classList.remove("consolation");
  }

  // 画面切り替え
  document.getElementById("rouletteScreen").classList.remove("active");
  document.getElementById("couponScreen").classList.add("active");
  window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:"smooth"});

  // 当選時のみ演出
  if(prize.win){
    flash();
    confetti();
  }
}

/* ----- フラッシュ演出 ----- */
function flash(){
  const f = document.getElementById("flash");
  f.style.transition="none";f.style.opacity=".9";
  void f.offsetHeight;
  f.style.transition="opacity .7s ease";f.style.opacity="0";
}

/* ----- 紙吹雪 ----- */
function confetti(){
  const box = document.getElementById("confetti");
  box.innerHTML="";
  const colors=["#fff4cf","#f5d97a","#d4af37","#b3262b","#fff"];
  for(let i=0;i<70;i++){
    const p=document.createElement("i");
    p.style.left=Math.random()*100+"%";
    p.style.background=colors[Math.floor(Math.random()*colors.length)];
    p.style.animationDuration=(2.4+Math.random()*2)+"s";
    p.style.animationDelay=(Math.random()*0.6)+"s";
    p.style.transform=`rotate(${Math.random()*360}deg)`;
    p.style.borderRadius=Math.random()>.5?"2px":"50%";
    box.appendChild(p);
  }
  setTimeout(()=>{box.innerHTML="";},5200);
}

/* ----- 利用済み → 最初の画面に戻る ----- */
function useCoupon(){
  const toast = document.getElementById("toast");
  toast.classList.add("show");

  setTimeout(()=>{
    toast.classList.remove("show");
    resetToStart();
  }, 1600);
}

/* ----- 初期画面へリセット ----- */
function resetToStart(){
  document.getElementById("couponScreen").classList.remove("active");
  document.getElementById("rouletteScreen").classList.add("active");
  document.getElementById("status").textContent = "";
  document.getElementById("spinBtn").disabled = false;
  document.getElementById("machine").classList.remove("win");
  document.getElementById("coupon").classList.remove("consolation");
  currentResult = null;
  initReels();
  window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:"smooth"});
}

/* ----- リール初期表示 ----- */
function initReels(){
  const base=["maguro","anago","tamago"];
  for(let i=0;i<3;i++){
    const strip=document.getElementById("strip"+i);
    strip.style.transition="none";
    strip.style.transform="translateY(0)";
    strip.innerHTML=symHTML(base[i]);
  }
}

initReels();
</script>
</body>
</html>
